name: Logician
author: Resonant Alpha
description: Policy and reasoning rules engine redesigned as a modular add-on.

surfaces.label: Policy Engine
surfaces.description: View policies, trust gates, and reasoning rules.

workflowBoundaries.label: Deterministic reasoning gates
workflowBoundaries.jobToBeDone: Run policy, consistency, schema, and reasoning checks that should not depend on LLM memory or improvisation.
workflowBoundaries.userValue: The human gets repeatable verification evidence before agents complete risky or structured work.
nonGoals: Replace human judgment for high-impact approvals

skills.name: Verification policy design
skills.description: Define when a workflow needs deterministic checks, what evidence is required, and which failure policy applies.

connectors.name: Policy library
connectors.description: Reads reviewed policy and protocol files used to evaluate deterministic checks.

scripts.name: Logician policy check
scripts.description: Run a deterministic policy check and produce verification evidence.
